untranslatable_reason: Double Top (Adam & Eve) structure and industry confirmation cannot be fully expressed with available indicators. The pattern requires: (1) identification of two distinct tops at similar price levels, (2) a valley between them, and (3) confirmation of topping patterns in correlated stocks. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and cross-asset correlation analysis beyond single-bar indicator conditions. The conversion above captures the bear market confirmation and volume breakout conditions, but misses the core structural pattern validation.
